title.en: How to Improve System Throughput by 10x: An End-to-End Network Optimization Guide
title.zh: 如何将系统吞吐量提升 10 倍？网络通信全链路优化指南

summary.en: A systematic guide to improving network-path throughput through batching, lower copy overhead, sequential I/O, zero-copy, pipelining, and fewer repeated serialization passes.
summary.zh: 从批量化、少拷贝、顺序 I/O、zero-copy、pipeline 与减少重复编解码六个方向，系统梳理网络通信链路的高吞吐优化方法。

readingDirection.en: Read this when diagnosing throughput bottlenecks, designing a high-throughput data path, or planning coordinated optimization across network, memory, and storage layers.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在排查系统吞吐瓶颈、设计高吞吐数据链路或规划网络与存储联合优化方案时阅读。
